steps.title: Use slope as rainfall rate
steps.content: The graph shows total rainfall, so the rainfall rate on an interval is the slope of the graph over that interval. A horizontal segment means the total rainfall is not changing.

steps.title: Read the flat interval
steps.content:
Between $x=2$ and $x=4$, the graph is horizontal. The change in rainfall is $0$ centimeters over $2$ hours.
$$\frac{0}{2}=0$$

steps.title: Choose the true statement
steps.content: The true statement is that the rate of rainfall was $0$ centimeters per hour between $x=2$ and $x=4$. The answer is D.
